## Checklist

- [ ] `dotnet test` is green
- [ ] New logic has a test (plus an edge/adversarial case where it matters)
- [ ] No secrets are logged or persisted; `DRY_RUN` is respected for any new mutation
- [ ] New config is documented in the README and `.env.example`
- [ ] Metric label sets are unchanged (or the change is called out)
